---
title: "Conchology articles"
---

## Conchology articles

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1894-7
**Genre:** Non-fiction, natural history
**Format:** Articles in Journal

**Publisher:** Monthly Packet

### Notes

This series of articles on shells, published without any overall title, consisted of the following:
\'The Sailors who Swim from the Head’ MP (September 1894) 310-7
‘Ancient Dyers’ MP (June 1895) 704-11
‘Marble Makers’ MP (September 1895) 331-6
\'Cameos and Porcelain\' MP (March 1896) 317-322
‘Snails’ MP (June 1896) 691-6
‘Venus and Hearts’ MP  (March 1897) 324-7
‘The Sluggish Race’ MP (June 1897) 642-7
‘Bores and Borers’ MP (August 1897) 182-8.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
